name: Quick Cheddar Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray the inside of an 8x4x3-inch loaf pan with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
4. Cut in butter using a pastry blender or two knives held like scissors until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together milk and egg.
6. Pour the milk mixture into the flour mixture all at once; stir in cheddar cheese. Mix gently just until the batter is moistened; do not overmix.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean and the top is browned.
9. Remove from oven and let cool in pan for a few minutes. Then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
10. If not serving immediately, wrap tightly in plastic wrap and store at room temperature for up to 3 days.
